basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Accountant Notification 2026 was released on 05-05-2026 on the official website of Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the BFUHS Accountant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation is applicable as follows: SC/BC: 5 years; Punjab Govt. employees etc.: up to 45 years; Widows/divorcees etc.: up to 40 years. Age will be calculated as on 01-01-2026.

qualification.details: Accountant: M.Com with 1st Division from a recognized University or Institution with at least five years of experience in a Public Sector Undertaking or a limited company. Preference will be given to candidates having knowledge of Computer Operations, Data Entry, and retrieval of information. Matriculation with Punjabi is also required.

salary_details.details: Pay Level-6 (Rs. 35400/-) as per 7th CPC (Rs. 35400 Per Month)

selection_process: Written Test (minimum 33% marks) Marks for experience Inter-se merit
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Accountant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS Accountant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BFUHS Accountant positions is 04 June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate and submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years for the Accountant post. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Com degree with a 1st Division from a recognized university and have at least five years of relevant experience. Knowledge of computer operations is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Accountant position by Baba Farid University of Health Sciences.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 2360/-, which includes the base fee and GST.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Accountant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Accountant post will receive a salary of Rs. 35400 per month, as per Pay Level-6 of the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BFUHS Accountant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test, evaluation of experience marks, and inter-se merit to determine the final candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/BC candidates (5 years), Punjab Govt. employees (up to 45 years), and Widows/divorcees (up to 40 years).

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the BFUHS Accountant Recruitment 2026 must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.
